The UK inflation rate staying at 3% may lead to a neutral monetary policy stance, but the potential impact of the Iran war on oil prices could weaken the GBP as the UK is a net oil importer, and risk sentiment may shift negatively. This could lead to a short-term decline in GBP_USD.
